name: Olive Spread Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced black olives and toasted walnuts in a food processor. Pulse until finely minced.
2. Add the mayonnaise and process until well combined.
3. Stir in the chopped thyme and season with white pepper to taste.
4. Lay each bread slice flat on a cutting board or plate.
5. Spread 2 tablespoons of the olive mixture onto each slice, rolling tightly into a log shape.
6. Wrap each roll securely in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2-96 hours.
7. When ready to serve, cut each roll at an angle, then divide into four pieces.
8. Garnish with thin slices of black olives and serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
